description: Owner / Founder of PvP Empire, Director of Endless Space Film, MultiCraft YouTuber, PvPer, and editor known for high quality edits. Currently ranked in the MTCTiers Top 10, Tier 2 across all kits, with a peak of HT2 in Dragonhide KB.

Owner of Glassbane and MVER, and the director of *Endless Space*. A retired MultiCraft PvPer (except in Emerald), currently LT1 in Emerald with a peak of #2 Emerald PvPer in his prime, and currently ranked as the #2 MultiCraft editor.
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
